title: Netflix vs Hulu
shortAnswer: Netflix dominates with global reach (190+ countries) and frequent originals, while Hulu focuses on US market with recent network TV and fan favorites.

keyDifferences.label: Original Content
keyDifferences.entityAValue: Emphasizes trending originals with frequent releases

keyDifferences.label: Content Focus
keyDifferences.entityBValue: Recent network TV with fan favorites

keyDifferences.label: Content Strategy
keyDifferences.entityBValue: Blends network TV with popular shows

prosA: Frequent release of trending original content
Wide variety of genres and styles
consA: May lack some fan favorite shows
prosB: Strong collection of recent network TV shows
Good selection of fan favorite content
Covers range of genres and styles
consB: Only available in the United States
verdict: Netflix wins for global users and original content lovers with its worldwide availability and frequent fresh releases. Hulu excels for US viewers wanting recent network TV and fan favorites but is limited by geographic restrictions.
